Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 3501 S 500 E, Whitestown
Description: Paved reservable truck/trailer parking lot listed on Truck Parking Club, just off I-65 at Exit 130 near the TA and Love's truck stops in Whitestown.
Budget hotel at I-65 Exit 103 (Southport Rd) on the south side of Indianapolis that offers free on-site parking including truck/bus parking. Truck-space capacity is very limited.

Mobile 24/7 roadside/tire repair provider that services the Indianapolis metro and I-65 corridor including Whitestown, Zionsville, Brownsburg and Boone County. Mobile-only; no fixed street address verified.

Description: Truck/trailer parking listing on Truck Parking Club in the Whitestown area near I-65.
Pilot Flying J travel center at I-65 Exit 139 (SR-39) in Lebanon. Offers diesel fuel lanes, showers, a Huddle House restaurant, and an on-site CAT Scale. Open 24 hours.

Description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Flying J Travel Center at I-65 Exit 139 in Lebanon. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.
Circle K fuel and convenience stop at I-65 Exit 168 (SR-38) east of Lafayette. Directories list roughly 8 truck parking spaces and 3 diesel lanes on the south side. Open 24 hours.

Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 175 (SR-25) in Lafayette, opened 2023. Amenities include diesel islands, 7 showers, a Hardee's, an on-site scale, and a co-located Love's Truck Care service center. Open 24 hours.

Co-located Love's Truck Care / Speedco service center at the Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 175 in Lafayette. Provides truck tire service, oil changes and PM service, light mechanical work, and roadside assistance.
Certified CAT Scale associated with the Love's Travel Stop at I-65 Exit 175 in Lafayette. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.
Speedway fuel and convenience stop at I-65 Exit 178 (SR-43) near West Lafayette, carrying diesel. Listed in truck-stop directories; specific truck parking availability was not verified.
Pilot travel center at I-65 Exit 201 (US-24/US-231) in Remington. Offers diesel lanes, showers, a Subway, laundry, and an on-site CAT Scale. Open 24 hours.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 201 in Remington. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.

Petro (TravelCenters of America) stopping center at I-65 Exit 201 (US-24) in Remington. Features about 150 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, an Iron Skillet restaurant, Dunkin' Express, laundry, a CAT Scale, and a co-located TA Truck Service shop. Open 24 hours.
Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center at I-65 Exit 201 in Remington. Weigh service is accessed through the host travel center.

Description: Co-located TA Truck Service repair facility at the Petro Stopping Center at I-65 Exit 201 in Remington. Full-service truck maintenance and repair with roadside assistance; directories list about 4 service bays.

Independent truck stop at I-65 Exit 205 (US-231), between Remington and Rensselaer. Directories list about 60 truck parking spaces, 5 diesel lanes, 2 showers, a travel store, and the on-site Crazy D's restaurant.
Family Express travel/convenience store at I-65 Exit 215 (SR-114) in Rensselaer, carrying diesel with truck parking, a deli, and travel store. Open 24 hours.

Full-service Pilot travel center in western Gary at the I-80/94 (Borman Expressway) Burr Street interchange, near the I-65 northern terminus. Amenities include diesel lanes, showers, CAT Scale, public laundry, and an on-site truck wash. Open 24 hours.

TravelCenters of America (TA) full-service truck stop in Gary at the I-80/94 (Borman Expressway) Burr Street interchange, near the I-65 northern terminus. On-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service, showers, and food (Taco Bell, Pizza Hut Express, Quaker Steak & Lube Express). Roughly 318 parking spaces (about 40 reserved and 40 paid).

Petro Stopping Center (TravelCenters of America) at the Grant Street interchange with I-80/94 (Borman Expressway), essentially at the I-65 northern terminus. Iron Skillet restaurant, CAT Scale, TA Truck Service, and about 15 showers. Roughly 405 parking spaces.

Love's Travel Stop at the Grant Street / I-80/94 (Borman Expressway) interchange adjacent to the I-65 northern terminus. CAT Scale, Godfather's Pizza and Naf Naf Grill, 9 showers, and 154 truck parking spaces. Reopened after a fire with added restaurants.

Pilot Travel Center directly on I-65 at Exit 240 (SR-2, Lowell/Hebron), the first major mainline stop at the corridor's northern end. Wendy's, CAT Scale, 8 showers and about 135 parking spaces. Open 24 hours.
Flying J Travel Center directly on I-65 at Exit 240 (SR-2 / 181st Ave, Lowell/Hebron). Denny's restaurant, CAT Scale, 15 showers, 4 truck service bays and roughly 375 parking spaces. Open 24 hours.
